title: Update github.com/containerd/containerd to 1.5.9
body:
```
go get github.com/containerd/containerd@latest
make vendor
```
    
... because 1.5.9 contains a vulnerability fix, and we want to silence scanners.
    
NOTE: Skopeo DOES NOT use the vulnerable code that was fixed in containerd 1.5.9, so it is NOT vulnerable to GHSA-mvff-h3cj-wj9c .

---

This PR also updates opencontainers/image-spec to fix using c/image along with other Go modules that reference the 1.0.2 release tag, like https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/3678 (that includes this containerd update).

comments.body:
Cast ye away evil scanners!  ;^)
LGTM
